## Meeting Purpose

[Handover briefing for the Ambient account.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**High-Touch Client:** Ambient is highly sensitive to change and requires constant reassurance, especially after losing their previous director (Mara).](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Data Misalignment:** The CMO (Alberto) distrusts Google Search Console (GSC) data, as the "average position" metric doesn't match his manual searches. This prevents him from reporting results to his execs.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Production Bottleneck:** A slow, multi-stage review process (brief → article) and a hyper-critical client have limited output to \~8 posts/month, creating a content runway of only 2 approved topics.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Trust-Building Priority:** The immediate goal is to build trust by educating the client on SEO fundamentals and streamlining the review workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

## Topics

### Client Context & Dynamics

  - [**Team:** CMO (Alberto), Mauricio, and Atul.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Key Dynamic:** Mauricio is resistant to change, while Alberto is engaged but highly skeptical of results.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Organizational Pressure:** Alberto needs to prove ROI to his execs (the founders) and is hesitant to report on early-stage metrics like a single non-branded click.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Production Bottleneck

  - [**Low Output:** The team has published only 25 posts in 3 months (\~8/month).](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A slow, multi-stage review process.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Stage 1:** Client approves a detailed brief ("draft URL").](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Stage 2:** Client reviews the full article draft.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Impact:** This workflow has created a content runway of only 2 approved topics, risking production halts.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Data & Reporting Misalignment

  - [**Client Request:** Monthly trend data, not weekly snapshots.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**GSC Misunderstanding:** Alberto distrusts GSC's "average position" metric, as it doesn't match his manual searches.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Rationale:** He needs to "prove to my boss something that is not visible."](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**Dashboard Simplification:** The query distribution chart was simplified (e.g., merging positions 11-20 and 21-30 into a single "+10" bucket) to reduce "noise" for the client.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [**Cohort Reporting Gap:** The Looker dashboard lacks clusters (e.g., "industry specific," "threat detection"), making it impossible to prove impact for specific content themes.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [Watch the previous client call recording to understand their resistance to change.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [Use the account summary template (to be provided by Jo) to prepare for the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [Prioritize building trust by educating the client on SEO fundamentals and streamlining the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [Investigate the contract renewal date (Q1/Q2) to understand the timeline for proving value.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [Send the account summary template to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/J2CeEkMGSTcybyVAFaU1tvz6zEEEm_qi?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
